items.title: Government looking into claims Labour think tank ordered investigation into journalists
items.description: The think tank paid a company at least £30,000 to investigate the origins of a story about undeclared donations.

items.title: Obama clarifies views on aliens after saying 'they're real' on podcast
items.description: Former US President Barack Obama says he has seen no evidence extra-terrestrials have made contact with Earth.

items.title: Swearing, illicit filming & rule changes - what next in curling cheating row?
items.description: It's been quite the few days in the Cortina Curling Stadium during a Winter Olympics that has delivered intrigue and excitement both on and off the fi...

items.title: GB curlers rise to occasion to keep semi hopes alive
items.description: Team GB's women curlers deliver their best stuff in the biggest moment as they beat Denmark to keep alive their Winter Olympics semi-final hopes.

items.title: Ski jumper disqualified for wearing oversized boots
items.description: Austrian ski jumper Daniel Tschofenig is disqualified from the men's large hill individual event for wearing oversized boots.
